package rulecoverage

func NegativePathSplitBaseOnly() string {
    ruleID := "path_split_base_only"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`path.Split(...)` when only the base name is used."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
